title: Sutured Khovanov homology, Hochschild homology, and the Ozsváth-Szabó spectral sequence
author_string: Auroux, Denis, Grigsby, J., Wehrli, Stephan
journal: Transactions of the American Mathematical Society
abstract:
In 2002, Khovanov-Seidel constructed a faithful action of the 

  
    
      (
      m
      +
      1
      )
    
    (m+1)
  

–strand braid group, 

  
    
      
        B
      
      
        m
        +
        1
      
    
    \mathfrak {B}_{m+1}
  

, on the derived category of left modules over a quiver algebra, 

  
    
      A
      m
    
    A_m
  

. We interpret the Hochschild homology of the Khovanov-Seidel braid invariant as a direct summand of the sutured Khovanov homology of the annular braid closure.
